ORDER DENYING DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO STRIKE

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AND MERCURY GENERAL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS DENIED IN ITS ENTIRETY. THE ALLEGATIONS REGARDING THE MEZZO SETTLEMENT ARE NOT IRRELEVANT OR FALSE WITHIN THE MEANING OF CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 436. THOSE ALLEGATIONS SUPPORT PLAINTIFFS' BAD FAITH CLAIM AND ARE NOT BARRED BY EVIDENCE CODE 1152. NOR ARE THE WAIVER AND ESTOPPEL ALLEGATIONS IRRELEVANT OR FALSE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-13-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. E. GERARD MANNION OF THE MANNION & LOWE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 733-1050 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MICHAEL L. BOLI, TEL. NO. (510) 535-9001 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. ALISON M. BERNAL OF HAGER DOWLING & SLACK, TEL. NO. (805) 966-4700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY and MERCURY GENERAL CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Denied in its entirety. The allegations regarding the Mezzo settlement are not irrelevant or false within the meaning of Code of Civil Procedure 436. Those allegations support plaintiffs' bad faith claim and are not barred by Evidence Code 1152. Nor are the waiver and estoppel allegations irrelevant or false. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
